description: A graphic of dark text on a light gray background, formatted as several paragraphs. The bold heading states that a 56-year-old man named David Courvelle pled guilty to sexually assaulting a Nicaraguan woman over several months at a Louisiana ICE detention facility. The following paragraphs summarize prosecutors' allegations, his confession, and that he was released on a 10,000 dollar bond with a sentencing date and possible penalties.
notable_text: pled guilty to sexually assaulting a Nicaraguan woman over the course of several months at a Louisiana ICE detention facility
